name: base
author: Danmaku
description: The built-in campaign: stage-1 and stage-2, their cast and bosses.

dialogue.speaker: warden
dialogue.text: I open nothing. I only hold.

dialogue.speaker: magistrate
dialogue.text: You have come a long way to be sentenced.

dialogue.speaker: magistrate
dialogue.text: Trespass. Persistence. The verdict is the same.

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: I did not come to be heard.

dialogue.speaker: chancellor
dialogue.text: No. You came to be filed.

spire.speaker: chancellor
spire.text: You are half-filed. Estoppel does the rest.

dialogue.speaker: regent
dialogue.text: Nothing is filed here. Everything already is.

dialogue.speaker: regent
dialogue.text: No one. That is what makes it binding.

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Show me the one who signs.

dialogue.speaker: regent
dialogue.text: You are looking at the signature.

spire.speaker: regent
spire.text: You climbed for a seat. Look at it.

spire.speaker: regent
spire.text: It has always been empty. The climbing is what fills it.

spread.description: loose fan that condenses into a converging focus seam

needle.description: parallel pins that lock into one bone-white focus cut

homing.description: loose tracking spread that focus stacks into a visible target lock

laser.description: pulsed free beam that focus sustains into a planted cutting edge

scatter.description: loose point-blank fan that focus compacts into a heavy ember knot

scout.label: SCOUT
scout.blurb: wide fan / focus seam, converting tide

lance.label: LANCE
lance.blurb: bone rake / focus cut, piercing bomb

hound.label: HOUND
hound.blurb: tracking spread / target lock, pack bomb

maw.label: MAW
maw.blurb: loose spray / ember knot, close devour
